2604.11720.title: On the Robustness of Watermarking for Autoregressive Image Generation
2604.11720.paper_summary: The proliferation of autoregressive (AR) image generators demands reliable detection and attribution of their outputs to mitigate misinformation, and to filter synthetic images from training data to prevent model collapse. To address this need, watermarking techniques, specifically designed for AR models, embed a subtle signal at generation time, enabling downstream verification through a corresponding watermark detector. In this work, we study these schemes and demonstrate their vulnerability to both watermark removal and forgery attacks. We assess existing attacks and further introduce three new attacks: (i) a vector-quantized regeneration removal attack, (ii) adversarial optimization-based attack, and (iii) a frequency injection attack. Our evaluation reveals that removal and forgery attacks can be effective with access to a single watermarked reference image and without access to original model parameters or watermarking secrets. Our findings indicate that existing watermarking schemes for AR image generation do not reliably support synthetic content detection for dataset filtering. Moreover, they enable Watermark Mimicry, whereby authentic images can be manipulated to imitate a generator's watermark and trigger false detection to prevent their inclusion in future model training.
2604.11720.paper_summary_zh: 自回归（AR）影像生成器的普及需求可靠的檢測和歸因其輸出，以減少錯誤資訊，並從訓練數據中過濾合成影像以防止模型崩潰。為了滿足這一需求，專為AR模型設計的水印技術在生成時嵌入微妙的信號，使得後續驗證可以通過相應的水印檢測器進行。在這項工作中，我們研究這些方案並展示它們對水印移除和偽造攻擊的脆弱性。我們評估現有攻擊，並進一步介紹三種新攻擊：（i）向量量化再生移除攻擊，（ii）基於對抗優化的攻擊，以及（iii）頻率注入攻擊。我們的評估顯示，移除和偽造攻擊在獲得單一水印參考影像的情況下是有效的，且不需要訪問原始模型參數或水印秘密。我們的發現表明，現有的AR影像生成水印方案並不可靠地支持合成內容的檢測以進行數據集過濾。此外，它們還使得水印模仿成為可能，即真實影像可以被操縱以模仿生成器的水印，並觸發錯誤檢測以防止其被納入未來的模型訓練中。
2604.11720.author: Andreas Müller et.al.
2604.11720.authors: Andreas Müller, Denis Lukovnikov, Shingo Kodama, Minh Pham, Anubhav Jain, Jonathan Petit, Niv Cohen, Asja Fischer
